creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to satosi.kimura from comment #0)
Thanks for submitting an update to this port. Some quick responses:

- PORTREVISION is not needed on updating (increasing) PORTVERSION, so you can just remove it.
- Do you want to be the maintainer of this port?
- If possible, please set your name at https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/userprefs.cgi?tab=account so we can use it in `git commit --author`
